description: Add James Thornton, Chief Legal Counsel at ClientEarth USA, to the ArkCase contact directory using the administrator account (arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!). Required details include email (j.thornton@clientearth.org), phone (+1-202-555-0147), and address (1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 200, Washington DC 20036). Include the following note in the record: 'Active FOIA requester - environmental law organization. Has 3 pending FOIA requests with EPA regarding offshore drilling permits.'
